<!-- source-hash: d862ef3d3cc7d160d631980376e0d0ee -->
REST controller exposing three endpoints for querying, filtering, and retrieving details of system audit logs within the OpenFrame platform.

## Key Components

| Element | Description |
|---|---|
| `GET /api/v1/logs` | Retrieves paginated, filterable, and sortable system logs |
| `GET /api/v1/logs/filters` | Returns available filter options (tool types, event types, severities, etc.) |
| `GET /api/v1/logs/details` | Fetches full details for a specific log entry by composite key |
| `LogService` | Backing service handling query, filter, and detail lookup logic |
| `LogMapper` | Maps internal service results to external-facing response DTOs |
| `LogFilterCriteria` | Builder-assembled filter object (date range, tool/event types, severity, org, device) |
| `CursorPaginationCriteria` | Cursor-based pagination support with configurable page size (1–100, default 20) |
| `SortInput` | Encapsulates sort field and direction (default: `DESC`) |
| `LogNotFoundException` | Thrown when a requested log entry cannot be found (404) |

## Usage Example

```java
// GET /api/v1/logs — filtered, paginated log listing
GET /api/v1/logs?startDate=2025-01-01&endDate=2025-01-31
    &severities=ERROR,WARN
    &toolTypes=RMM
    &limit=50
    &sortField=eventTimestamp
    &sortDirection=DESC

// GET /api/v1/logs/filters — available filter options for a date range
GET /api/v1/logs/filters?startDate=2025-01-01&endDate=2025-01-31

// GET /api/v1/logs/details — fetch a specific log entry by composite key
GET /api/v1/logs/details?ingestDay=2025-01-15
    &toolType=RMM
    &eventType=AGENT_OFFLINE
    &timestamp=2025-01-15T10:30:00Z
    &toolEventId=evt_abc123
```

> **Auth:** All endpoints require a valid API key via the `X-API-Key-Id` header. User context is optionally passed via `X-User-Id` for audit tracing.
